properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 147/18 

PLANED INMARSAT 1-3 TO 1-4 MIGRATION IN 2018 IS COMPETED. 

INDIAN OCEAN REGION (IOR) 1-3 TO EUROPE/MIDDLE EAST/AFRICA (EMEA) 1-4 COMPLETED ON 12 DECEMBER 2018


FOR FURTHER DETAILS OF THE SATELLITE MIGRATION PLAN AND NEW 
SATELLITE FOOTPRINTSCONSULT INMARSAT AT 
HTTPS://WWW.INMARSAT.COM/I3-I4-SERVICES-MIGRATION.
 
CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 125/18
